data.title: Identity and Access Management (IAM)
data.description: Uses multi-factor authentication and single sign-on to secure user credentials and access.

data.title: Web Application Firewall (WAF)
data.description: A protective WAF filters and monitors HTTP requests to safeguard the site from well-known web exploits.
data.technical_spec: Deployed using Azure WAF with OWASP core rule set.

data.title: Secure Socket Layer (SSL)/Transport Layer Security (TLS)
data.description: Ensures encrypted data transmission between user browsers and servers to protect data integrity.
data.technical_spec: Uses Azure Key Vault for managing SSL/TLS certificates.

data.title: Advanced Threat Protection (ATP)
data.description: Monitors and defends against advanced threats using machine learning and behavior analysis.
data.technical_spec: Integrated with Microsoft Defender Advanced Threat Protection.

data.title: Regular Security Audits and Penetration Testing
data.description: Conducts regular audits and tests to identify and resolve security vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Performed using a combination of automated tools and in-house security teams.
